name: 4th House with Benefics — Residential Comforts from Birth
description: Natural benefics (Jupiter/Venus/Mercury/Moon) placed in or aspecting the 4th house indicate a natal promise of residential comforts, property ownership, and domestic happiness throughout life.

source_text.quote: If benefics occupy or aspect the 4th house, the native will have many houses, vehicles, lands and will enjoy domestic comforts throughout life.

required: Natural benefics (Jupiter/Venus/Mercury/waxing Moon) are placed in or aspect the 4th house
optional: No malefic aspects on the 4th house

interpretation.meaning: Benefics in/aspecting the 4th house is the most fundamental classical indicator of property yoga. The native is born with the promise of owning comfortable residences.

metadata.notes: This is a structural pattern — it confirms natal promise but does not determine timing. Timing comes from Layers 1-3.

name: 10th Lord + 4th Lord in Kendras — Mansions & Large Properties
description: When both the 10th lord (karma/career) and 4th lord (property) are placed in kendra houses (1/4/7/10), the native acquires mansions, palatial residences, and large commercial properties.

source_text.quote: If the lords of the 10th and 4th are in kendras, the native possesses mansions, large estates, and multiple residential properties.

required: 10th lord is placed in a kendra house (1/4/7/10)
4th lord is placed in a kendra house (1/4/7/10)
optional: Both lords are in own/exalted signs
Both lords are in mutual aspect

interpretation.meaning: 10th lord (career/social status) combined with 4th lord (property) both in kendras creates powerful property yoga — the native acquires large properties befitting their social status.

metadata.notes: Both lords in kendras = maximum strength. This yoga indicates premium real estate and potentially multiple large properties.

name: Karakamsa with Benefic in 4th — Palatial Residence
description: When a natural benefic (Jupiter/Venus) occupies the 4th house from Karakamsa (Atmakaraka's Navamsa sign in Rashi), the native is destined for palatial, luxurious residential property.

source_text.quote: If Venus or Jupiter is in the 4th from Karakamsa, the native lives in palatial residences with all comforts and luxuries.

required: Jupiter or Venus is placed in the 4th house from Karakamsa
optional: The benefic is in own/exalted navamsa

interpretation.meaning: Jaimini's Karakamsa system indicates the soul's (Atmakaraka) residential destiny. Benefic in 4th from Karakamsa = palatial residence is the soul's karmic entitlement.

metadata.notes: Jaimini system. Karakamsa = Atmakaraka's Navamsa sign placed in Rashi. 4th from this indicates property destiny.

name: Karakamsa with Saturn in 4th — Stone/Cement House
description: Saturn placed in the 4th house from Karakamsa indicates the native will own a house built of stone, cement, or durable materials — modern concrete apartment or solid structure.

source_text.quote: If Saturn occupies the 4th from Karakamsa, the native's house will be built of stone and durable materials.

required: Saturn is placed in the 4th house from Karakamsa
optional: Saturn aspects the 4th house from Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Saturn in 4th from Karakamsa classically indicates stone/durable construction. In modern context: concrete apartment, RCC building, or premium construction quality.

metadata.notes: Jaimini's material classification. Saturn = stone/cement/concrete. Useful for determining property TYPE not timing.

name: Karakamsa with Mars in 4th — Brick/Clay House
description: Mars placed in the 4th house from Karakamsa indicates the native will own a house built of brick, clay, or fire-processed materials — traditional brick construction or terracotta homes.

source_text.quote: If Mars occupies the 4th from Karakamsa, the native's house will be built of bricks and burnt materials.

required: Mars is placed in the 4th house from Karakamsa
optional: Mars aspects the 4th house from Lagna

interpretation.meaning: Mars in 4th from Karakamsa classically indicates brick/fire-processed construction. In modern context: brick home, independent house, or property on own land.

metadata.notes: Jaimini's material classification. Mars = brick/clay/fire-processed. Indicates independent house rather than apartment.

name: 5th Lord Dignified + Connected to 4th — Lands Through Intelligence
description: When the 5th lord (Poorva Punya/intelligence/speculation) is dignified and connected to the 4th house or lord, the native acquires lands and property through intelligent investment, speculation, or past-life merit.

source_text.quote: If the 5th lord is dignified and aspects or conjoins the 4th lord, the native acquires lands and properties through his own intelligence and past merit.

required: 5th lord is connected to 4th house or 4th lord (conjunction/aspect/exchange)

interpretation.meaning: 5th lord (Poorva Punya/intelligence) connected to 4th (property) while dignified indicates property through intelligent decisions, smart investments, or karmic merit from past lives.

metadata.notes: 5th house = Poorva Punya (past-life merit) and intelligence. Connection to 4th indicates property comes through wisdom and karma.

name: 9th Lord + 4th Lord Connection — Wealth from Fortune for Property
description: Connection between the 9th lord (fortune/dharma/father) and 4th lord (property) through conjunction, aspect, or exchange creates powerful property yoga — wealth from fortune flows toward real estate.

source_text.quote: If the 9th lord and 4th lord are in mutual aspect, conjunction, or exchange, the native acquires great wealth in the form of lands and properties through fortune and father.

interpretation.meaning: 9th lord (Bhagya/fortune/father) connected to 4th lord (property/home) is a Rajayoga for property. Fortune and dharma flow directly into real estate — the native is destined for significant property.

metadata.notes: 9th-4th lord connection is one of the strongest property Rajayogas. Combines Bhagya (fortune) with Sukha (comfort/property).
